description_long: This object is a stylized doll head with exaggerated, large black eyes and a small, delicate mouth. The face is pale with subtle blush on the cheeks and thin, arched eyebrows. The hair is voluminous, smooth, and colored in a muted mauve or dusty rose shade, styled to frame the face and flow down the sides and back. The head is slightly elongated, with a rounded top and a gentle taper toward the chin. The surface appears smooth and matte, with no visible seams or joints, suggesting a molded plastic or resin construction. There are no visible accessories or clothing details, and the neck is short and blends seamlessly into the base.
description: A stylized doll head with large black eyes, pale skin, and smooth mauve hair, featuring a matte finish and delicate facial features.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's large black eyes, delicate mouth, arched eyebrows, and the framing mauve hair.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the smooth, voluminous hair extending backward and the profile of the face.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the rounded, seamless back of the head and the full volume of the hair.
description_view_3: Angled rear view emphasizes the smooth, flowing shape of the hair and the lack of facial features.
attribute_clothing_style: No visible clothing; only the head and hair are present.
attribute_pose: Head is upright and forward-facing; no limbs or torso are visible.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral expression with wide-open eyes, slightly arched eyebrows, and a small, closed mouth.
attribute_hair_style: Medium-length, smooth, and voluminous mauve hair, parted to the side and framing the face.
